title: Trump extends pause on attacking Iran energy facilities to April 6
summary_full: Trump announced the U.S. would continue a pause on energy sites in Iran as key stock market indexes fell and oil prices rose.
summary_public: Trump announced the U.S. would continue a pause on energy sites in Iran as key stock market indexes fell and oil prices rose.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trump extends pause on attacking Iran energy facilities to April 6
